channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. Xbox Game Pass adds 2 extra July perks: free *League of Legends* and *Wuthering Waves* rewards  en.softonic.com
  5. Over 20 Games Are Coming to XBOX From July 20—24  Windows Report

item.title: Apple’s M6 chip is coming soon, here’s everything we know - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. Apple’s M6 chip is coming soon, here’s everything we know  9to5Mac
  2. Apple’s M6, M7 and M8 Chips Show How AI Is Reshaping the Company  Bloomberg.com
  3. Apple Is Reportedly Accelerating Chip Releases Due to AI Pressure  CNET
  4. Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips  The Verge
  5. Apple’s M7 Ultra could take on Nvidia Blackwell with a staggering 1.5TB of memory  Yahoo Tech
